commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f442b46f2508f53c611096005a768d9600135874)
commands.review_summary:
This PR makes post-compaction AGENTS.md section refresh opt-in through `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`, adjusts collapsed Control UI tool-card summary formatting/styles, and updates docs, tests, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level behavior: current main defaults unset `postCompactionSections` to `Session Startup`/`Red Lines`, the PR flips that to null, and current main still appends AGENTS.md sections into compaction summaries. I did not run a live compaction or browser session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers require maintainer judgment on compatibility and compaction-summary policy before any automated repair should choose the final behavior.

target.title: fix: make compaction reinjection opt-in
target.body:
## Summary

- make post-compaction AGENTS.md section reinjection opt-in via `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`
- keep explicit default section lists working, including legacy `Every Session` / `Safety` fallback only for opted-in configs
- improve collapsed Control UI tool rows so summary text wraps/readably colors in light/dark themes while expanded details preserve raw input/output
- update config help/docs and changelog

Fixes #45488.
Fixes #45649.
Supersedes #67090.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts` -> 4 files, 58 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.post-compaction-guard.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts` -> 5 files, 232 passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md docs/gateway/config-agents.md docs/reference/session-management-compaction.md docs/reference/token-use.md src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.css ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- Browser proof with system Chrome + Playwright fixture using real `ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.css`: light/dark collapsed rows computed `white-space: normal`, `text-overflow: clip`, `overflow-wrap: anywhere`; expanded raw text stayed `with Example Deck`

Broad changed gate was attempted but blocked by environment/provider setup:

- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` failed because `.github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml` does not contain a Testbox step
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` fell back to AWS and failed because this environment has no usable AWS credentials/IMDS access

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Post-compaction AGENTS.md reinjection is disabled unless users explicitly configure `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`; collapsed Control UI tool rows remain readable without hiding normal summaries behind CSS ellipses, while raw expanded tool input/output remains unchanged.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw worktree on macOS with Node/Vitest; browser rendering proof in installed Google Chrome through Playwright using the real Control UI tool-card stylesheet.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section for exact Vitest, format, oxlint, diff-check, autoreview, and browser proof commands.

Evidence after fix: Unit tests cover unset config returning null, explicit `[]` disabled, explicit default sections enabled with legacy fallback, custom sections, collapsed display cleanup, bounded collapsed markdown preview, and raw expanded details preservation. Browser proof checked computed light/dark collapsed row styles and raw expanded text.

Observed result after fix: All targeted tests and local format/lint checks passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` was not completed because both configured Crabbox remote providers were blocked by environment/provider setup as described above.
target.author: bunsdev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
